# Label

Styled label component built on the zw-label primitive.

<div class="zw-badge-row">
  <span class="zw-badge">@zeus-web/label</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">zweb add label</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">Generated</span>
</div>

## Add

```bash
zweb add label
```

## Imports

Styled component:

```tsx
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label'
```

Primitive React wrapper:

```tsx
import { Label } from '@zeus-web/label/react'
```

Web Component entry:

```ts
import '@zeus-web/label/wc'
```

## Props

| Prop             | Type      | Default | Description                                           |
| ---------------- | --------- | ------- | ----------------------------------------------------- |
| `for`            | `string`  | -       | ID of the associated form control.                    |
| `required`       | `boolean` | -       | Shows a required indicator.                           |
| `disabled`       | `boolean` | -       | Marks the label as disabled.                          |
| `visuallyHidden` | `boolean` | -       | Visually hides the label while keeping it accessible. |

## Events

No public events documented.

## Slots

| Slot      | Description    |
| --------- | -------------- |
| `default` | Label content. |

## Styling

Uses Tailwind: yes

Theme tokens:

- `text-foreground`
- `text-destructive`

Internal selectors:

- `[data-slot=label]`
- `[data-slot=label-required-indicator]`

## Registry

Type: `registry:ui`

Dependencies:

- `@zeus-web/label`
- `class-variance-authority`
- `clsx`
- `tailwind-merge`

Files:

- `default/lib/utils.ts` → `lib/utils.ts` (`registry:lib`)
- `default/label.tsx` → `components/ui/label.tsx` (`registry:ui`)

## AI usage rules

Do:

- Use Label with form controls.
- Use for to associate labels with control ids.

Do not:

- Do not use Label as a generic text wrapper.

## Examples

### React styled usage

```tsx
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label'

export function Example() {
  return <Label for="email">Email</Label>
}
```
